title: How AI Mode is changing the way people search in the U.S.
author: Shivani Mohan Vice President Data Science and UXR
raw_description: One year after launch, see how AI Mode’s users are shifting from keywords to natural language queries.
summary: 谷歌AI模式上线一年后，用户搜索行为从关键词转向自然语言查询，改变了搜索方式。
analysis_note: 内容偏向产品应用和用户行为分析，技术深度一般，但展示了AI在搜索领域的实际影响。
